name: Mint, Coriander AND Mango Chutney
servings: makes enough for 4–6 as an accompaniment
intro: I love this simple chutney. It’s so good spooned over the lamb seekh kebabs: you will be amazed how the flavours work together. If you’re serving this to guests, they’ll probably be wondering what the heck went into it, it’s such an interesting flavour combo.

ingredients.item: fresh green chillies, to taste, finely chopped

method: Finely chop the coriander (cilantro) and mint leaves and place in a blender with the remaining ingredients, adding salt to taste. Blend until smooth and use within three days.
